conversation_summary: Created PRD for cortex-app — a Tauri desktop app with Claude API brain that autonomously pursues a single goal (revenue/MRR growth) with KPI tracking and unrestricted action space. 9 user stories covering scaffold, goal config, KPI input/dashboard, agent brain, autonomous loop, action framework, activity feed, and E2E testing.
next_steps: Start new session and run /run-project cortex-app to begin execution
Or run /execute-task cortex-app/US-001 to scaffold the Tauri app first
Repo repos/private/cortex-app needs to be created before execution

metadata.title: PRD: cortex-app — autonomous agent desktop app
